zoneId.description: (deprecated) The zone ID from Criteo. Should be replaced by networkId when using zone matching.

networkId.description: The network ID from Criteo. Please reach out your Criteo representative for more details.

pubid.description: Publisher id of your inventory group provided by your Technical account manager if using inventory groups to map your inventory in Commerce Grid

nativeCallback.description: (deprecated) (Prebid.js only) Callback to perform render in native integrations. Please reach out your Criteo representative for more details.

integrationMode.description: (Prebid.js only) Integration mode to use for ad render (none or 'AMP'). Please reach out your Criteo representative for more details.

publisherSubId.description: Custom identifier for reporting. Please reach out your Criteo representative for more details.
